description: Style NotePure police To Be, for men, is a new and multi-faceted fragrance that generates a strong impact. It comes in a blue skeleton shaped flacon.Product DetailsTop notes are grape fruit and pepper heart notes are violet leaf and base notes are patchouli, virginia cedar and mberCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize125 ml
